Hero.title: Your driver in Bern
Hero.subtitle: Personal driving service for Bern and airport transfers to Zurich – reliable, friendly, and easy to book online.

Services.cityDescription: Available on weekends at an hourly rate – flexible for trips, errands, or appointments.
Services.airportDescription: Mon–Fri from 5pm, Sat & Sun around the clock, at a fixed price – relax on your way to the gate or back home.

Trust.title: Why Dein Fahrer?
Trust.licensedText: Commercial passenger transport with a valid permit.
Trust.vehicleText: 7 seats, and can be converted into a van with seats removed on request.
Trust.priceText: Fixed price for airport transfers, fair hourly rate in the city – no hidden costs.

Account.noBookings: You don't have any bookings yet. Book your first ride now.

Legal.termsIntro: These terms apply to all bookings made through this website.
Legal.termsBookingBody: City rides (Bern & surroundings, Sat/Sun only) and airport transfers (Bern–Zurich, Mon–Fri from 5pm, Sat/Sun around the clock) must be booked at least 24 hours in advance. Booking creates a binding contract between the customer and [Company name].
Legal.termsPriceBody: City rides are billed at an hourly rate, airport transfers at a fixed price. Payment is made online at the time of booking. All prices are in Swiss francs (CHF), including any applicable VAT.
Legal.termsCancelBody: Free cancellation is possible up to 24 hours before the booked pickup time. Later cancellations or no-shows are charged the full fare.
Legal.termsLiabilityBody: [Company name] is liable within the scope of applicable law and its business liability insurance. [Placeholder — please replace with legally reviewed text.]
Legal.privacyIntro: This privacy policy explains how personal data is processed when using this website and app.
Legal.privacyDataBody: When you register and book, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and booking details (date, addresses, passenger count). Payment data is processed exclusively by our payment provider Stripe and is not stored by us.
Legal.privacyPurposeBody: Data is used to process your booking, for communication, and — with your consent — to improve our service.
Legal.privacyRightsBody: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. Contact [Email address].
Legal.privacyContactBody: Responsible for data processing: [Company name], [Address], [Email address].
